members.name: Sterling Hirsch
members.title: Advanced Planning Lead / Collective VFO Mgr.
members.bio:
Sterling Hirsch serves as the Advanced Planning Lead for Collective VFO, where he focuses on facilitating the Proactive Planning Process and collaborating with a team of experts to deliver holistic and tailored solutions for high-net-worth individuals, families, and business owners.

With 23 years of senior-level business management experience, Sterling has successfully founded and led five companies from inception to profitability. His solutions-oriented mindset, persistence, and calm management style enable him to turn obstacles into opportunities while driving results.

Sterling brings a deep understanding of the unique challenges faced by CPA firms and has a proven ability to help them integrate the Proactive Planning Process into their practices. This collaboration allows CPAs to deliver enhanced value to their best clients by addressing complex needs and providing strategic guidance.

Specializing in identifying client priorities, uncovering opportunities, and implementing actionable strategies, Sterling guides clients through a seamless and collaborative process to achieve their most important goals.

members.name: Anna-Marie Lovell
members.title: Advanced Planning Lead
members.bio:
Anna-Marie Lovell serves as an Advanced Planning Lead at Collective VFO, where she specializes in guiding clients through proactive wealth strategies centered on tax efficiency, multi-generational planning, and personalized advisory support. She collaborates with families, business owners, and high-net-worth individuals to develop coordinated strategies that reflect

their long-term vision, legacy objectives, and evolving needs.

With a disciplined background rooted in military service and a career marked by client-centered planning, Anna-Marie brings a unique perspective to the Proactive Planning Process. Her

analytical approach and strong commitment to service empower clients to clarify priorities and take strategic action with confidence.

Anna-Marie began her career of service through the U.S. Navy, where she was commissioned as a Surface Warfare Officer. She completed her Naval Science training at UC Berkeley and earned her Bachelor of Science in Biological Sciences with an emphasis in Neurology, Physiology, and Behavior from the University of California, Davis. She served on the USS Curts (FFG-38) and the USS Nimitz (CVN-68), where she developed her leadership and operational skills, including a nuclear power sub-specialty.

Today, Anna-Marie applies that same mission-driven focus to helping clients build and preserve wealth through coordinated planning. She is passionate about supporting clients in defining goals, identifying key opportunities, and implementing solutions that align with their values and long-term aspirations.

members.name: Christina Messer
members.title: Tax Planning Partner
members.bio:
With over 20 years of expertise in marketing and communications, corporate training, graphic design, and website development, Christina Messer is a creative visionary and strategic problem-solver. Her ability to transform big-picture goals into actionable strategies has made her a trusted partner for business owners and high income families seeking clarity and results.

As the founder of a boutique tax, accounting, and consulting firm, Christina specializes in providing tailored financial solutions that eliminate stress and save time. Her firm offers comprehensive services, including meticulous bookkeeping, proactive tax planning strategies to legally minimize liabilities, and seamless tax filing—all handled in-house with the highest level of professionalism and care.

Christina is a trusted advisor for business leaders and high-net-worth individuals who value peace of mind and financial confidence. By simplifying the complexities of tax and accounting, she empowers clients to focus on growth, innovation, and doing what they do best, while ensuring their financial goals are always within reach.

members.name: Natalya Grigoriev
members.title: CPA Partner
members.bio:
Natalya Grigoriev is the Founder and President of Custom Accounting CPA, where she has built a reputation for delivering exceptional tax planning services to high-income earners, high-net-worth individuals, and business owners. As a CPA with decades of expertise, Natalya specializes in strategic tax optimization and business advisory services tailored to the unique needs of her clients.

In addition to leading Custom Accounting CPA, Natalya is proud to serve as a Proactive Planning Team Member at Collective VFO. This collaboration expands her ability to provide clients with a holistic approach to tax planning, leveraging the expertise of a diverse network of strategic partners. Together, they deliver seamless, integrated solutions that align personal and business financial objectives, empowering clients to achieve their goals with confidence and clarity.

Natalya’s passion lies in building long-term relationships and guiding clients through the complexities of financial decision-making. Her dual roles allow her to offer unparalleled service, blending her deep accounting knowledge with forward-thinking planning strategies to meet the evolving needs of today’s dynamic financial environment.

Outside of her professional life, Natalya is an active member of the PASBA (Professional Association of Small Business Accountants) community, dedicated to supporting her aging parents and pursuing her passion for dance.

members.name: Valerie Klimenko
members.title: CPA Partner
members.bio:
As a CPA and Senior Client Manager at Custom Accounting CPA, I specialize in tax compliance and advanced tax planning for high-income earners, high-net-worth individuals, and business owners. My focus is on optimizing tax strategies, preserving wealth, and ensuring my clients achieve long-term financial success through proactive and tailored solutions.

In addition to my work at Custom Accounting CPA, I serve as a Proactive Planning Team Member at Collective VFO. This role allows me to collaborate with a network of strategic partners, providing my clients with seamless, integrated financial solutions. By leveraging the resources and expertise of the Collective VFO team, I help align personal and business financial goals, creating a holistic approach to financial planning that drives measurable results.

What I enjoy most about my work is building trusted relationships and empowering clients to navigate complex financial challenges. With a blend of traditional accounting services and forward-thinking advisory strategies, I strive to simplify the complexities of financial planning and deliver solutions that help my clients thrive in today’s dynamic landscape.

Let’s connect—I’d be happy to discuss how we can work together to achieve your financial goals!

members.name: Xavier Yuchongtian
members.title: CPA Partner
members.bio:
Experienced Managing Principal and integral member of a proactive planning team, specializing in advanced tax planning and collaborative services for business owners and high-income, high-net-worth clients. With a strong background in the manufacturing and retail industries, Xavier is skilled in identifying strategic opportunities that align with clients' financial goals, helping them navigate complex tax and financial challenges.

Xavier’s expertise spans Taxation, Financial Reporting, the Sarbanes-Oxley Act, and Financial Analysis. His forward-thinking approach enables him to deliver tailored solutions that support wealth preservation and business growth. A graduate of California State University-Northridge with a Bachelor of Science in Accounting and Finance, he is currently pursuing a Master’s degree in Business Taxation at the University of Southern California, further enhancing his ability to deliver innovative and effective planning strategies.

members.name: Phillip Graybeal
members.title: CPA Partner
members.bio:
With over 20 years of financial leadership experience—ranging from overseeing $200M healthcare organizations to turning around multi-million-dollar operating challenges—I bring a proven track record of driving profit, revenue growth, and cost reduction. As the Owner of Graybeal Tax & Accounting C.P.A. and Advanced Planning Lead at Collective VFO, I blend strategic CFO services with innovative financial planning approaches.

In my role as Advanced Planning Lead at Collective VFO, I am dedicated to delivering tailored financial solutions that empower high-net-worth families and business owners to achieve their financial aspirations. By adopting a proactive planning approach and leveraging the Virtual Family Office model, I provide clients with comprehensive, personalized strategies that transcend traditional financial advisory services—ensuring every aspect of their financial and personal priorities is addressed seamlessly and effectively.

My dual focus on operational excellence in healthcare and visionary planning for families and business owners is driven by core values of Gratitude, Impact, Grit, Optimism, and Authenticity believe that through continuous learning and authentic leadership, we can turn financial challenges into lasting opportunities.
